scripts.build: pnpm --filter @starter/shared run build && pnpm --filter @starter/server run build && pnpm --filter @starter/client run build
scripts.build:server: pnpm --filter @starter/shared run build && pnpm --filter @starter/server run build
scripts.build:client: pnpm --filter @starter/shared run build && pnpm --filter @starter/client run build
scripts.test: pnpm run test:unit && pnpm run test:client && pnpm run test:e2e
